title: Hyperliquid II
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by liquidation attack on a manipulated token

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle data and then triggers liquidation on the same asset
prevention.trigger: ORACLE_MANIPULATION -> LIQUIDATE( manipulated_asset ) in single tx

red_flags: Price manipulation leading to large liquidations
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ORACLE_MANIPULATION -> LIQUIDATE( manipulated_asset ) in single tx
summary: A trader manipulated the price of $JELLY, causing Hyperliquid's liquidation engine to trigger a massive liquidation, forcing the protocol to either face significant financial loss or reveal its centralized control mechanisms.
